JVNVU#91295052
Siemens製品に対するアップデート（2026年7月）
Siemensから各製品向けのアドバイザリが公表されました。
Siemensのアドバイザリを参照してください。
新規：10件

SSA-104023: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS on RUGGEDCOM APE1808 Devices
SSA-288252: Unquoted Search Path Vulnerability in IAM Client
SSA-470355: Zlib and Foxit Vulnerabilities in CADRA
SSA-585531: Multiple Vulnerabilities in SIDIS Secured SmartPlug before V7.26.0310
SSA-734552: Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in OpenSSL Affecting Desigo CC
SSA-814963: Insecure Inherited Permission in Mendix
SSA-828211: Denial of Service Vulnerability in SIMATIC S7-PLCSIM Advanced
更新：7件
SSA-082556: Vulnerabilities in the additional GNU/Linux subsystem of the SIMATIC S7-1500 CPU 1518(F)-4 PN/DP MFP V3.1.5

SSA-434797: Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in OpenSSL affecting Siemens Products
SSA-555707: Information Disclosure Vulnerability in Simcenter STAR-CCM+
SSA-688146: Multiple Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerabilities in SIMATIC S7 PLCs Web Server
SSA-864900: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Fortigate NGFW on RUGGEDCOM APE1808 Devices
SSA-967325: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS on RUGGEDCOM APE1808 Devices
